name: kids
description: Preset for young learners on a tablet — one idea per screen, big touch targets, drag/sketch interaction, visible celebration, CRA sequencing. Skill-only: composes <SketchPad> + <Challenge> + <Paged> and leans on the audience pack's CRA row. No new deps.

skill.loadWhen: the learner is a young child on a touch device — build a game-like, one-idea-per-screen tablet lesson
